column1: **canopySkinOpt:** |br| Canopy selector to use additional skin friction effect on drag coefficient: |br| 0=off; 1=on |br| *C-M if canopySelector==1*
**canopy_cd:** |br| Non-dimensional canopy drag coefficient |br| *C-M if canopySelector==1*
**canopy_lf:** |br| Representative canopy element length scale |br| *C-M if canopySelector==1*
